recommendations.product_name: Cocktail Kingdom Koriko Weighted Shaking Tin (set)
pros: Professional-grade; snug fit for easy shake
Popular with bartenders and home pros
cons: Can be pricier than basic tins
Some recent user reports of seal/quality variability
Sold as tins (may be separate pieces)

recommendations.product_name: Viski Rocket Cocktail Shaker / Viski Bartender Kit
pros: Stylish retro design; comes as a complete kit option
Well-reviewed consumer bar sets with good value
Widely available and frequently recommended in roundups
cons: Cobbler-style shaker may not suit pro bartenders
Some kits omit pro-grade Japanese jiggers or weighted tins
Finish can show wear over heavy use

pros: Budget-friendly and a common beginner recommendation

Good value for gifts and entry-level home bars
cons: Some reviewers note fit/finish issues on small parts
Not as durable for heavy professional use
